title: Inspector
emptyStatePrimary: Select an agent or connection to edit it.
emptyStateSecondary: Add an agent from the left palette to get started.
editingLocked: Editing is locked while a conversation is running.
enrichHint: Tell the AI something new about this agent — a decision it should follow, a capability it turned out to need, a correction — and it will mature the role, instruction, characteristics, and skills to match. Review before applying.
enrichPlaceholder: e.g. This agent should now double-check any numeric claims against the source before repeating them.
enrichTitle: Mature this agent using the assigned provider
enhanceBlockedNoProvider: Assign a provider to enable AI enhancement.
enhanceBlockedNoModel: Select a model to enable AI enhancement.
personaHint: Role agents play a specialist. Digital shadows speak in first person as a named real person, citing their public work in character.
knownForPlaceholder: Philosophy of mind; the hard problem of experience
terminalKindHintFinalizer: Runs automatically in the wrap-up phase, after the discussion ends — you don't need to wire edges into it, and any incoming edges are ignored for scheduling. Finalizers run after summarizers and produce the final word.
terminalKindHintSummarizer: Runs automatically in the wrap-up phase, after the discussion ends — you don't need to wire edges into it, and any incoming edges are ignored for scheduling. Summarizers run before finalizers.
moderatorHint: Scheduled by graph edges like a participant, but always sees the full transcript and carries a facilitation contract. Wire it in wherever you want it to intervene (e.g. after each round). Grant it orchestration tools (Tools section) to let it direct questions at agents, redirect the topic, or end the discussion.
enhanceTitle: Rewrite this instruction using the assigned provider
skillsHint: Declared capabilities merged into the prompt — not executable tools.
noSkillsToExport: This agent has no skills to export.
webSearchKeySaved: Web search key saved for this session.
deleteAgentMessageWithConnections: Delete "{{name}}"? Its connections will be removed. Transcript history is preserved.
orchestrationHint: Orchestration tools — let this {{kind}} influence the conversation flow (directed questions get an immediate out-of-turn answer).
executableToolsHint: Executable tools the agent can call mid-turn to fetch real facts and sources.
webSearchKeyHint: App-wide; stored only in this browser session, never in playgrounds or exports.
connectionsHint: Directed edges from this agent. A button alternative to dragging between nodes.
effectivePromptHint: Read-only. Shows how this agent's configuration becomes a model instruction. Estimated context: ~{{tokens, number}} tokens (character-based estimate).
connTypeDesc_conversation: The target may respond after the source.
connTypeDesc_review: The target reviews the source's most recent answer.
connTypeDesc_handoff: The target receives the source output as its primary task context.
instructionOverridePlaceholder: Focus only on factual weaknesses in the previous response.
